title: Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026

detail.title: Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026
detail.short_info: Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026 through DUAT is open. Online application started on 7 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 28 May 2026. Check DUAT exam dates (29 & 30 June 2026), eligibility, application fee, and admission process for MA, MSc, MCom courses.

content.text: Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026 is open through the Dibrugarh University Admission Test (DUAT) 2026. Online applications started on 7 May 2026 and the last date to apply is 28 May 2026 (11:55 PM). The entrance exam (DUAT 2026) will be held on 29 & 30 June 2026 for admission into various 2-year PG programmes for the academic session 2026-27.
Direct Link to Open Official Portal: Click Here

Dibrugarh University (DU) has released the official notification for Dibrugarh University Admission Test (DUAT) 2026 for admission to Post Graduate programmes. This test is conducted for direct admission into various PG courses offered by Dibrugarh University and its affiliated colleges.

sections.heading: Important Dates for Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026

rows: Bachelor’s Degree with Major/Honours in the concerned subject securing at least 45% marks OR Bachelor’s Degree with at least 50% marks in the subject and 45% in aggregate
Lateral Entry to 7th Semester of FYIPGP
Successfully completed 6th Semester of FYUG/FYIPGP under NEP 2020 with minimum 60 credits in the subject

content.text: Note: Relaxation in marks for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per university norms.
Payment Mode: Online through Debit/Credit Card or Internet Banking.

sections.heading: How to Apply for Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026

items: Click on the DUAT 2026 / PG Admission link.
Register with valid email and mobile number.
Fill the online application form carefully.
Submit and take a printout of the confirmation page.

sections.heading: Dibrugarh University PG Admission 2026 Exam Pattern (DUAT)

items: Mode: OMR Based Offline Entrance Test
Duration: To be announced (usually 2 hours per paper)
Type of Questions: Multiple Choice Questions (MCQs)
Subjects: Subject-specific + General Knowledge/Current Affairs/Reasoning (as per programme)

seo_tags: Dibrugarh University MA MSc MCom Admission
